languages.original_text: "Attesting to the paradoxical fluctuations of the Motive Force within the machine circuit. This unit is unable to reliably determine if this is a tech-heresy or a Category Three miracle of the Omnissiah. Modification of standard galvanic rituals is required to open the circuit."

languages.text: "Свидетельствую парадоксальные флуктуации Движущей Силы внутри машинного контура. Данная единица не способна достоверно определить, является ли это техноересью или чудом Омниссии третьей категории. Для размыкания цепи необходима модификация стандартных гальванических ритуалов".
languages.translation_comment: characters try to solve a Necron riddle to save a space marine

languages.text: "Attesting to the paradoxical fluctuations of the Motive Force within the machine circuit. This unit is unable to reliably determine if this is a tech-heresy or a Category Three miracle of the Omnissiah. Modification of standard galvanic rituals is required to open the circuit."
languages.original_text: "Свидетельствую парадоксальные флуктуации Движущей Силы внутри машинного контура. Данная единица не способна достоверно определить, является ли это техноересью или чудом Омниссии третьей категории. Для размыкания цепи необходима модификация стандартных гальванических ритуалов".

"Attesting to the paradoxical fluctuations of the Motive Force within the machine circuit. This unit is unable to reliably determine if this is a tech-heresy or a Category Three miracle of the Omnissiah. Modification of standard galvanic rituals is required to open the circuit."

languages.text: 「機械回路内の動機力の矛盾した変動を証明する。このユニットは、これがテクノヘレシーかオムニシアの第2の奇跡か、確実に判断できない。回路を開くには、標準的な電気化学的儀式を修正する必要がある」
languages.original_text: "Attesting to the paradoxical fluctuations of the Motive Force within the machine circuit. This unit is unable to reliably determine if this is a tech-heresy or a type two miracle of the Omnissiah. Modification of standard galvanic rituals is required to open the circuit."

traits.locale_text: 機械回路内の動機力の矛盾した変動を証明する。このユニットは、これがテクノヘレシーかオムニシアの第2の奇跡か、確実に判断できない。回路を開くには、標準的な電気化学的儀式を修正する必要がある。

languages.text: « Confirmation des fluctuations paradoxales de la Force Motrice dans le circuit de la machine. Cette unité est incapable de déterminer de manière fiable s'il s'agit d'une technohérésie ou d'un miracle de l'Omnimessie de catégorie trois. Une modification des rituels galvaniques standards est requise pour ouvrir le circuit. »
languages.original_text: "Attesting to the paradoxical fluctuations of the Motive Force within the machine circuit. This unit is unable to reliably determine if this is a tech-heresy or a Category Three miracle of the Omnissiah. Modification of standard galvanic rituals is required to open the circuit."

traits.locale_text: « Confirmation des fluctuations paradoxales de la Force Motrice dans le circuit de la machine. Cette unité est incapable de déterminer de manière fiable s'il s'agit d'une technohérésie ou d'un miracle de l'Omnimessie de catégorie trois. Une modification des rituels galvaniques standards est requise pour ouvrir le circuit. »

languages.text: "Bestätige die paradoxen Fluktuationen der Antriebskraft innerhalb des Maschinenkreises. Diese Einheit kann nicht verlässlich sagen, ob es sich hier um eine Tech-Ketzerei der Kategorie Drei oder ein Wunder des Omnissiah handelt. Modifikation galvanischer Standardrituale zum Öffnen des Schaltkreises erforderlich."
languages.original_text: "Attesting to the paradoxical fluctuations of the Motive Force within the machine circuit. This unit is unable to reliably determine if this is a tech-heresy or a Category Three miracle of the Omnissiah. Modification of standard galvanic rituals is required to open the circuit."

traits.locale_text: "Bestätige die paradoxen Fluktuationen der Antriebskraft innerhalb des Maschinenkreises. Diese Einheit kann nicht verlässlich sagen, ob es sich hier um eine Tech-Ketzerei der Kategorie Drei oder ein Wunder des Omnissiah handelt. Modifikation galvanischer Standardrituale zum Öffnen des Schaltkreises erforderlich."

languages.text: "Makine devresi içindeki Devinim Gücü'nün paradoksal dalgalanmalarını tasdik ediyorum. Bu birim, bunun bir tekno kâfirlik mi yoksa Hermesih'in Üçüncü Kategori bir mucizesi mi olduğunu güvenilir bir şekilde belirleyemiyor. Devreyi açmak için standart galvaniz ayinleriyle değişiklik yapılması gerekiyor."
languages.original_text: "Attesting to the paradoxical fluctuations of the Motive Force within the machine circuit. This unit is unable to reliably determine if this is a tech-heresy or a Category Three miracle of the Omnissiah. Modification of standard galvanic rituals is required to open the circuit."

traits.locale_text: "Makine devresi içindeki Devinim Gücü'nün paradoksal dalgalanmalarını tasdik ediyorum. Bu birim, bunun bir tekno kâfirlik mi yoksa Hermesih'in Üçüncü Kategori bir mucizesi mi olduğunu güvenilir bir şekilde belirleyemiyor. Devreyi açmak için standart galvaniz ayinleriyle değişiklik yapılması gerekiyor."

languages.text: «Atestiguo las fluctuaciones paradójicas de la Fuerza Motriz en el interior del circuito de la máquina. Esta unidad no puede determinar de manera fiable si se trata de una tecnoherejía o de un milagro del Omnissiah de categoría tres. Se requiere una modificación de los rituales galvánicos convencionales para abrir el circuito».
languages.original_text: "Attesting to the paradoxical fluctuations of the Motive Force within the machine circuit. This unit is unable to reliably determine if this is a tech-heresy or a Category Three miracle of the Omnissiah. Modification of standard galvanic rituals is required to open the circuit."

traits.locale_text: «Atestiguo las fluctuaciones paradójicas de la Fuerza Motriz en el interior del circuito de la máquina. Esta unidad no puede determinar de manera fiable si se trata de una tecnoherejía o de un milagro del Omnissiah de categoría tres. Se requiere una modificación de los rituales galvánicos convencionales para abrir el circuito».

languages.text: “检测到机械回路中源力存在悖论性波动。本单位无法准确判定此现象属于技术异端，还是欧姆尼赛亚的第三类神迹。需要修改标准流电圣仪以开启回路。”
